# dokploy_slack_notification (Resource)

A Slack notification configuration. Dokploy posts deploy/backup/restart events to the configured webhook.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dokploy_slack_notification" "alerts" {
  name        = "production-alerts"
  webhook_url = var.slack_webhook
  channel     = "#deploys"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel` (String) Slack channel (e.g. `#deploys`).
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `webhook_url` (String, Sensitive) Slack incoming webhook URL.

### Optional

- `app_build_error` (Boolean) Notify on build error.
- `app_deploy` (Boolean) Notify on application deploy.
- `database_backup` (Boolean) Notify on database backup events.
- `docker_cleanup` (Boolean) Notify on Docker cleanup.
- `dokploy_backup` (Boolean) Notify on Dokploy self-backup events.
- `dokploy_restart` (Boolean) Notify on Dokploy restart.
- `server_threshold` (Boolean) Notify on server resource threshold breaches.
- `volume_backup` (Boolean) Notify on volume backup events.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `slack_id` (String) Slack-specific sub-ID used for updates.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import dokploy_slack_notification.alerts <notificationId>
```
